horoscope: Deflated feelings are possible early today, dear Aries, but an adjusted plan may be all the better for you. This change could lead to positive outcomes. Aim to reconnect with your intuition if you’ve been pushing yourself too hard or ignoring your need for rest and reflection. You’re in good shape to handle the more practical side of relationships with Venus now in your solar sixth house, but today, you may be looking to the past for answers to work or health concerns, which can be a helpful exercise in moderation. However, it may be best to avoid falling back on old methods just because they’re more comfortable if they prevent you from moving forward. Consider whether you’re holding onto something that no longer serves you well, particularly an attitude or expectation. In a similar vein, watch for a tendency to throw yourself into chores or work to avoid dealing with a problem or emotion. Fortunately, business intuition rises, and you may very well scope out a good deal or come up with a great idea. You may be quite pleased with recent accomplishments or the work you're doing (or aspiring to do). Or you appreciate people and situations you sometimes take for granted. Today's energies help you unblock, heal, and accept, largely by helping you feel more appreciative of what you have. Openness in your interactions can be a major key to happiness and satisfaction.

Temporarily, progress can be slow with a heartfelt interest, such as a love relationship or a creative project, dear Taurus, but you can take small steps toward achieving your goals. It’s best to avoid carelessness in matters of the heart in the meantime. There can be a connection with an old love interest or friend, or you’re feeling sentimental about a past love or pet project. You can benefit from looking to the past, as you may reawaken a worthwhile pursuit, but consider where you could be holding onto the past in unhealthy ways. As Venus meets the South Node, your inclination may be to fall back on quick fixes or the easy route instead of moving in the direction of challenge, reward, and growth. But with Chiron positively in the mix, you're magnetizing situations and people that/who are right for you or leave you with a sense that you're improving and growing as the day advances. Personal appeal is strong. Guiding others, or allowing someone to guide you gently, leaves you feeling stronger and happier.

There’s some inclination to fall back on comfortable behaviors rather than challenge yourself or aim to grow and learn, dear Gemini, as Venus meets the Moon's South Node. Old habits seem to have a strong pull on you now, and a good deed from the past can benefit you. Using your talents can yield rewards, but it may also be wise to challenge yourself in small ways. Aim to take some time out, or focus on the vision rather than the details of a plan or project, for now. With Venus in your protective solar fourth house, you assign a high value to familiar situations, people, and feelings, particularly in love. You may be doing a lot of reminiscing about old relationships, particularly comfortable ones. Fortunately, you're in a good position to approach loved ones and family life in new, creative, growth-oriented ways instead of mindlessly repeating old patterns as the day advances. If you need to repair a relationship or come to a better understanding of a past issue, this is a particularly potent time to do so. Being willing to approach emotional matters in original ways is the key now. Healing can happen through quiet, family activities, or some level of solitude.

Try to avoid borrowing from the future, not only with money but also with time and energy today, dear Cancer, as you might be tempted to put things off. Transits early today can pull you into the past. You’re disinclined to put yourself out or challenge yourself, preferring to fall back on talents and resources you already have, which can occasionally be what you need. Still, it’s best to avoid enabling or appeasing others in ways that might come back to haunt you later. Be discreet and tactful, particularly with relatives, neighbors, and classmates, but avoid promises or deferrals. With Venus currently transiting your communications zone, you feel positive in relationships when there's good verbal rapport. As the day progresses, strong energy is with you to open up conversations and feel the support of people in your life. There can be a real feeling of emotional wholeness through your conversations and connections.

Today’s events can make it clear what steps you need to take to improve your finances or take charge of your earnings, dear Leo. Income from your own efforts benefits most, but you might also be putting faith in a special someone. However, it can be tempting to fall back on talents and resources you already have instead of putting yourself out or challenging yourself. This can be fine sometimes, but it’s best to avoid appeasing or passing up on opportunities now. Avoid promises or deferrals, even though they seem far more attractive than usual. Someone from behind the scenes is likely on your side, or a surprise show of support can surface. Today also holds good energy for opening your heart and letting some of your fears drop. You could be combining talents, abilities, and resources with someone quite successfully to get something constructive done. An unusual or nontraditional approach to business today can be most worthwhile.

Good energy is with you for releasing yourself from something from the past, dear Virgo. A Venus-South Node connection helps you let go of stress and tension. Still, it can convince you to take the easy way out. Sometimes, you need a break, but other times, you miss opportunities to grow and learn if you back away from a challenge, and the latter may be the case right now. If you notice you’re frequently falling back on doing things on your own when pairing up or sharing the load would be much better for you, you might decide to make changes. Try to nip this problem in the bud. Dealing with loose ends or settling accounts can be helpful to clear the pathway for smoother endeavors and activities in the future. Venus is in your sign now, boosting your popularity and friendliness. Chiron is positively in the picture now, and you can feel your heart opening up. If you've been feeling insecure about a relationship, this can dissipate today. It's your ease and naturalness that is most appealing.

Strong memories guide you, or you make unusual connections now, dear Libra. You might connect with an old friend this week as Venus and the South Node align in your solar twelfth house. With this aspect, there can be some tendency to seek the easy way out, but with the help of Chiron today, and with a little poking around and self-honesty, you might learn what’s most valuable to you. This process can benefit you greatly. You might tie up loose ends as you become aware of delays or matters you previously overlooked that now require your attention. You may need to correct past mistakes and omissions to clear the path. The day holds strong potential for viewing others in a particularly compassionate light, which feels healthy and affirming. In the process, or through conversation and observation, you may come to a greater understanding of a private matter, your deeper feelings, or a relationship. The focus is on unblocking or starting a healing process today.

Expressing your confidence in your more unique qualities comes naturally today, dear Scorpio, particularly through your communications. The best approach to relationships today is a supportive one, as empowering each other works best, leading to increased trust and bonding. Socially, you could be in the mood to get comfortable. A connection with an old friend or strong memories of someone from your past can figure strongly now, and you’re in a more sentimental mood than usual. Nevertheless, don’t let this stop you from making some connections, as an opportunity can emerge for exciting personal discoveries through your interactions. Matters from the past certainly gain your attention today, but you’re getting to a point where you see the areas that have held you back. In fact, you can gain a stronger sense than usual of what and who is valuable and worthy of your energy. You're focused on the positive, growth-oriented aspects of your relationships today, and you can learn a lot about yourself and your needs with an open heart.

Today’s transits position you well to inventory your feelings, likes and dislikes, and affections, dear Sagittarius. It's easier to see which attachments may be holding you back from growing and thriving. You might make a plan to clear out old projects that are slowing your progress or to take care of duties so you can start fresh. For the best results today, loosen up your schedule a little to make room for creative envisioning before making your next move. With openness and humbleness, you can learn a lot today. Business and practical sense improve with a nice dose of intuition and confidence, and you could feel more valued by others, especially those you work with or in a position of authority.

It can be enjoyable to give further thought to recent issues, dear Capricorn, or to discuss them. You are taking care of unfinished business now that will help move things forward later. Transits today can prompt you to consider which habits or attachments in your life may be holding you back from growing and thriving, particularly mentally and in your attitudes and mindsets. Aim to use your diplomatic talents in your dealings, but watch for a tendency to please and appease that might come back to haunt you later. Stay alert for opportunities to advance your interests rather than sticking to the same old comforts. Lean towards activities and people that encourage you to improve, grow, and develop for the best results. Acceptance and patience are vital ingredients for successful relationships now, and fortunately, quite easy to muster up. Sharing visions of the future or new ideas and activities can boost a relationship. The Moon spends more time in your creativity sector before moving into your house of work, habits, and health. As the day progresses, taking care of errands, small jobs, and duties comes into stronger focus.

Applying yourself to special projects, creative pursuits, and hobbies can bring fantastic rewards today, dear Aquarius. Look for opportunities to clear up debts or settle accounts, as it's a great time to consider letting go of unnecessary attachments. For example, you might want to seek ways to pay off debts or recover loans. You have a strong desire to know that your future is secure and that achieving your goals will satisfy you in the long run. You may be finishing paperwork or overlooked errands to get the ball rolling to move forward, receive money, or move beyond a tricky situation. Venus is transiting your intimacy sector, bringing you into closer touch with your emotional attachments and inner passions. Chiron is currently a guest in your sector of home, family, the past, and personal identity, stirring up vulnerabilities and offering gifts of vision in these areas. With both bodies connecting with the Moon's Nodes today, aim to be willing and open to address problem areas, especially with finances, the sharing of money or power, or matters of support.

You might benefit from looking to the past for answers to problems in the present, dear Pisces. Do watch for relying too heavily on others in areas where you’d be better off getting things done independently. Otherwise, tying up loose ends may be necessary before you can confidently go forward. It’s a good time to find something lost or overlooked and, on another level, see where you may have been taking the easy road to your disadvantage. Aim to harness the powerful energy available to you to intuit your way forward in your projects, communications, and friendships. With Venus now in your partnership sector, bringing more harmony to your relationships is more achievable, especially as you boost understanding and respect. Conversations are open, words are healing, and you are focused on improving and growing.
